CustomField.formula:
IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Response_Text__c)), Response_Text__c,
IF( NOT(ISNULL(Response_Number__c)), TEXT(Response_Number__c),
IF( NOT(ISNULL(Response_Currency__c)), TEXT(Response_Currency__c),
IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Response_Date__c)), TEXT(Response_Date__c), "No Answer" ) ) ) )
CustomField.label: Question Answer
